LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, MAR-29-2023 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF ARCHIMEDES BANYA SF, L.L.C.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-21-597088 WITH CASE NO. CGC-22-602161. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE "JOINT MOTION FOR COMPLETE CONSOLIDATION OF CASE NO. CGC-22-602161 WITH CASE NO. CGC-21-597088" IS DENIED FOR THE REASONS EXPRESSED IN LINE 15 OF THIS CALENDAR (CGC-21-597088). COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-597088 WITH CASE CGC-22-602161
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ALEXANDER GOLOVETS, Esq. of Law Offices of Alexander Golovets (Tel: 415-562-7151) for plaintiff Archimede Banya SF, L.L.C.;
Atty. LAURA G. RYAN, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scullt Mansukhani, LLP (Tel: 415-875-3133) for defendant Wang Insurance Agency, Inc.;
Atty. TIFFANIE BROWN, Esq. of Law Offices of Kenneth J. Freed (Tel: 818-990-0888) for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc. in Case No. CGC-21-597088;

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ARCHIMEDES BANYA SF, L.L.C.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-21-597088 WITH CASE NO. CGC-22-602161.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The "joint motion for complete consolidation of case no. CGC-22-602161 with case no. CGC-21-597088" is denied for the reasons expressed in Line 15 of this calendar (CGC-21-597088).

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
